answer:
The Otter.ai MCP server allows AI assistants to securely access your meeting transcripts, summaries, and action items directly within your workflow [1][2][3].

There are two primary ways to connect:

1. Official Otter.ai Connector: This is a hosted remote server [3]. You can connect it via your MCP client (such as Claude Desktop) using the URL https://mcp.otter.ai/mcp. Authentication is handled via OAuth [3].

2. OtterAB MCP Server: If you use OtterAB, use your API key to connect via the remote URL: `https://www.otterab.com/mcp/YOUR_API_KEY/v2/mcp` [4].

Always verify which service provider you are using, as integration methods differ between platforms [3][4].
